2. Look for any 'Share', 'Export', 'Save As', or 'Print' options within the app's UI (e.g., context menus, share sheets, settings).
3. If any such options exist, attempt to use them on the downloaded content.
test_cases.expected_result: There should be no visible or functional options within the PocketToons app to share, export, save, or otherwise transfer the downloaded comic content to other applications or outside the app's controlled environment.

test_cases.scenario: Edge case: Attempt to screenshot downloaded content (device-level control).
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
A free comic 'Screenshot Comic - Episode 1' is downloaded.
Device has standard screenshot functionality.
steps: 1. Open 'Screenshot Comic - Episode 1' for reading.
2. Attempt to take a screenshot of the comic page using the device's native screenshot function.
test_cases.expected_result: The screenshot either should be prevented (e.g., 'Cannot take screenshot due to security policy') or, if taken, the image should appear blank, black, or contain a DRM watermark instead of the comic content itself. (Prevention is ideal if technically feasible).

test_cases.scenario: Negative case: User can export downloaded content from the app.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
A free comic 'Exportable Comic - Episode 1' is downloaded.
steps: 1. Open 'Exportable Comic - Episode 1'.
2. Locate a 'Share' or 'Export' option (e.g., in a menu, long-press context).
3. Use this option to attempt to share or save the comic (e.g., to Photos/Gallery, email, another app).
test_cases.expected_result: The app allows the user to export, share, or save the downloaded comic pages (e.g., as image files) to external locations or other applications. (This would be a critical security failure).

test_cases.scenario: Happy path: Download operations run on a background thread, maintaining UI responsiveness.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
Device has an active internet connection.
Sufficient device storage is available.
A free comic 'Background Thread Comic - Episode 1' is available, large enough to take noticeable time to download (e.g., > 100 MB).
steps: 1. Initiate download for 'Background Thread Comic - Episode 1'.

2. While the download is in progress, actively interact with other parts of the app (e.g., browse other comic series, navigate through settings, scroll lists, open other non-downloaded comics for viewing).
3. Observe UI fluidity and responsiveness.
test_cases.expected_result: The app's UI remains fully responsive, smooth, and interactive while the download proceeds in the background. There should be no noticeable lag, freezing, or stuttering in the UI interactions.

test_cases.scenario: Edge case: Multiple simultaneous downloads running on background threads.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
Device has an active internet connection.
Sufficient device storage is available.
Three distinct free comic episodes 'Multi-Thread A', 'Multi-Thread B', 'Multi-Thread C' are available, each large enough to take a few seconds to download.
steps: 1. Initiate downloads for 'Multi-Thread A', 'Multi-Thread B', and 'Multi-Thread C' simultaneously.
2. While all three downloads are in progress, navigate through various sections of the app.
3. Observe UI responsiveness.
test_cases.expected_result: The app's UI remains responsive and fluid, even with multiple downloads running concurrently in the background. UI interactions should not be significantly degraded.

test_cases.scenario: Negative case: Download operations block the UI thread, causing unresponsiveness.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
Device has an active internet connection.
Sufficient device storage is available.
A free comic 'Blocking Thread Comic - Episode 1' is available, large enough to take noticeable time to download.
steps: 1. Initiate download for 'Blocking Thread Comic - Episode 1'.
2. Immediately try to scroll through lists, tap buttons, or navigate to other screens within the app.
test_cases.expected_result: The app's UI becomes unresponsive, freezes, or exhibits significant lag and stuttering immediately after initiating the download, making interaction difficult or impossible until the download completes. (This would be a failure of the feature).

test_cases.scenario: Boundary test: Offline reader page load performance on a mid-range device.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
A free comic 'Mid-Range Test Comic - Episode 1' is fully downloaded.
Device is offline (Wi-Fi and mobile data off).
Test device is a pre-approved 'mid-range' device model (e.g., Google Pixel A series, Samsung Galaxy A series, specific older iPhone model).
Performance measurement tools are available.
steps: 1. Perform steps similar to TC-112 on the designated mid-range device.
2. Record page load times for multiple pages.
test_cases.expected_result: On the mid-range test device, each comic page in the offline reader should consistently load and render within 1 second. If any page takes longer, it's a boundary violation.

test_cases.scenario: Violation test: Offline reader page load exceeds 1 second on a mid-range device.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
A free comic 'Mid-Range Slow Comic - Episode 1' is fully downloaded.
Device is offline (Wi-Fi and mobile data off).
Test device is a pre-approved 'mid-range' device model.
Performance measurement tools are available.
steps: 1. Perform steps similar to TC-112 on the designated mid-range device.
2. Record page load times for multiple pages.
test_cases.expected_result: One or more comic pages take longer than 1 second to load and render on the mid-range test device. (This would be a failure of the performance requirement).

test_cases.scenario: Happy path: A downloaded comic remains accessible even if removed from the platform.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
A free comic 'Platform Removed Comic - Episode 1' is downloaded.
Admin access to remove 'Platform Removed Comic - Episode 1' from the platform's content catalog without deleting it from local devices.
steps: 1. Download 'Platform Removed Comic - Episode 1'.
2. Use admin tools to remove 'Platform Removed Comic - Episode 1' from the online content catalog.
3. Ensure device is online so app can sync with server for content catalog updates.
4. Open the PocketToons app.
5. Navigate to the 'Downloads' tab.
6. Attempt to open and read 'Platform Removed Comic - Episode 1'.
test_cases.expected_result: 'Platform Removed Comic - Episode 1' is still listed in the 'Downloads' tab and can be fully opened and read, despite no longer being available on the online platform. No error messages about content unavailability should appear when reading the downloaded version.

test_cases.scenario: Edge case: Comic removed from platform while user is offline.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
A free comic 'Offline Platform Removed Comic - Episode 1' is downloaded.
Admin access to remove it from the platform.
Device is offline.
steps: 1. Download 'Offline Platform Removed Comic - Episode 1'.
2. Disconnect network connections.
3. Use admin tools to remove the comic from the online platform.
4. While still offline, open the app and access the downloaded comic.
5. Reconnect to the internet and restart the app.
6. Access the downloaded comic again.
test_cases.expected_result: The downloaded comic should remain accessible both before and after reconnecting to the internet and syncing, until its natural expiry.

test_cases.scenario: Negative case: Downloaded comic becomes inaccessible after being removed from the platform.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
A free comic 'Inaccessible Removed Comic - Episode 1' is downloaded.
Admin access to remove it from the platform.
steps: 1. Download 'Inaccessible Removed Comic - Episode 1'.
2. Use admin tools to remove it from the online platform.
3. Ensure device is online and app has synced.
4. Open the PocketToons app and navigate to the 'Downloads' tab.
5. Attempt to open 'Inaccessible Removed Comic - Episode 1'.
test_cases.expected_result: The downloaded comic is either removed from the 'Downloads' tab or attempting to open it results in an error (e.g., 'Content no longer available'). (This would be a failure of the feature).

test_cases.scenario: Boundary test: Removed content remains accessible up to its 30-day expiry.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
A free comic 'Removed Accessible Comic - Episode 1' is downloaded.
Admin access to remove the comic from the platform.
System clock manipulation is possible.
steps: 1. Download 'Removed Accessible Comic - Episode 1'. Note download date (T0).
2. On T0 + 5 days, remove the comic from the platform via admin tools.
3. Verify accessibility in app (should still be accessible).
4. Advance system clock to T0 + 29 days.
5. Verify the comic is still accessible in 'Downloads'.
6. Advance system clock to T0 + 30 days.
7. Verify the comic is no longer accessible/removed from 'Downloads'.
test_cases.expected_result: The downloaded comic, even after being removed from the platform, remains fully accessible until its 30-day expiry from the initial download date. It is then automatically removed.

test_cases.scenario: Violation test: Removed content becomes inaccessible before its 30-day expiry.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
A free comic 'Violation Removed Comic - Episode 1' is downloaded.
Admin access to remove the comic from the platform.
System clock manipulation is possible.
steps: 1. Download 'Violation Removed Comic - Episode 1'. Note download date (T0).
2. On T0 + 5 days, remove the comic from the platform via admin tools.
3. Advance system clock to T0 + 20 days (well within 30 days).
4. Open the app and attempt to access 'Violation Removed Comic - Episode 1'.
test_cases.expected_result: The downloaded comic is found to be inaccessible or removed from the 'Downloads' tab, despite not having reached its 30-day expiry. (This would be a failure of the feature).

test_cases.scenario: Happy path: User is warned before starting new downloads if available device storage is below 50 MB.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
Device has an active internet connection.
Device's available storage is 49 MB.
A free comic 'Low Storage Warn Comic - Episode 1' is available for download.
steps: 1. Manipulate device storage to be 49 MB (below 50 MB threshold).
2. Attempt to initiate download for 'Low Storage Warn Comic - Episode 1'.
test_cases.expected_result: Before the download starts, a warning message is displayed (e.g., 'Low Storage: Your device storage is low. Downloads may fail. Proceed anyway?'). The user is given an option to proceed or cancel.

test_cases.scenario: Edge case: Warning persists across multiple download attempts when storage remains low.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
Device has an active internet connection.
Device's available storage is 30 MB.
Two free comics 'Persistent Warn A' and 'Persistent Warn B' are available.
steps: 1. Manipulate device storage to 30 MB.
2. Attempt to download 'Persistent Warn A', observe warning. Cancel.
3. Attempt to download 'Persistent Warn B'.
test_cases.expected_result: The low storage warning is displayed again for the second download attempt, confirming consistent behavior when storage remains below the threshold.

test_cases.scenario: Negative case: Device storage below 50 MB, but no warning appears.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
Device has an active internet connection.
Device's available storage is 40 MB.
A free comic 'No Warn Comic - Episode 1' is available for download.
steps: 1. Manipulate device storage to 40 MB.
2. Attempt to initiate download for 'No Warn Comic - Episode 1'.
test_cases.expected_result: The download starts without any warning message regarding low storage. (This would be a failure of the feature).

test_cases.scenario: Boundary test: Storage warning threshold at 50 MB - No warning at 51 MB.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
Device has an active internet connection.
Device's available storage is 51 MB.
A free comic 'Threshold Test Comic 1 - Episode 1' is available.
steps: 1. Manipulate device storage to 51 MB.
2. Attempt to initiate download for 'Threshold Test Comic 1 - Episode 1'.
test_cases.expected_result: The download starts immediately without any low storage warning. (This passes the 'no warning' side of the boundary).

test_cases.scenario: Boundary test: Storage warning threshold at 50 MB - Warning at 49 MB.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
Device has an active internet connection.
Device's available storage is 49 MB.
A free comic 'Threshold Test Comic 2 - Episode 1' is available.
steps: 1. Manipulate device storage to 49 MB.
2. Attempt to initiate download for 'Threshold Test Comic 2 - Episode 1'.
test_cases.expected_result: A low storage warning message is displayed before the download proceeds. (This passes the 'warning' side of the boundary).

test_cases.scenario: Violation test: Storage warning appears at > 50 MB or doesn't appear at < 50 MB.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
Device has an active internet connection.
A free comic 'Violation Threshold Comic - Episode 1' is available.
steps: 1. Manipulate device storage to 60 MB.
2. Attempt to download 'Violation Threshold Comic - Episode 1'. (Violation if warning appears).
3. Manipulate device storage to 40 MB.
4. Attempt to download 'Violation Threshold Comic - Episode 1'. (Violation if no warning appears).
test_cases.expected_result: If a warning appears at 60 MB or no warning appears at 40 MB, it indicates a violation of the 50 MB threshold. This test passes if it *finds* such a violation.

test_cases.scenario: Happy path: Downloads are prevented on metered connections by default.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
Device is connected to mobile data (Wi-Fi off).
The 'Download on mobile data' setting is OFF (default state).
A free comic 'Metered Connection Comic - Episode 1' is available for download.
steps: 1. Ensure Wi-Fi is off and device is using mobile data.
2. Navigate to 'Metered Connection Comic - Episode 1'.
3. Tap the 'Download' icon/button.
test_cases.expected_result: The system prevents the download from starting and displays a message informing the user that downloads on mobile data are disabled by default (e.g., 'Downloads on mobile data are disabled. Please connect to Wi-Fi or enable downloads in settings.'). The download should not begin.

test_cases.scenario: Edge case: Switching from Wi-Fi to mobile data mid-download.
preconditions: User is logged in to the PocketToons mobile app.
Device is connected to Wi-Fi.

coverage_gaps: REQ-035: Downloaded content must be encrypted on the device. - Verification of encryption requires white-box testing, access to the application's internal file structure, or specialized security tools to confirm the content is truly encrypted and not just obfuscated. Black-box testing can only confirm inaccessibility from outside the app (covered by REQ-037).

REQ-036: The encryption method for downloaded content must be AES-256. - Direct verification of the specific AES-256 encryption algorithm typically requires security audits, code reviews, or specific tooling to analyze the cryptographic implementation, which is beyond standard black-box QA capabilities.

REQ-042: The offline reader page load performance must be met on mid-range devices. - The definition of 'mid-range devices' can be subjective. While specific models can be chosen for testing, ensuring coverage across the full spectrum of 'mid-range' might be challenging without a comprehensive device lab and explicit device specifications from product/engineering.

REQ-030: Downloaded content must expire 30 days after its download date. - Testing this requirement manually is time-consuming as it requires waiting for 30 days or manipulating device/server time, which may not always be feasible or reliable across all test environments. This is better handled with automated tests or dedicated test environments with time-warp capabilities.

REQ-032: Content expiry notifications must be sent 3 days before the content expires. - Similar to REQ-030, this requires precise time manipulation or dedicated long-running tests, making full manual coverage challenging for specific timing checks.

REQ-034: Removal of subscription-gated downloads upon subscription lapse must occur within 24 hours. - This is a time-sensitive background process. Manual verification requires waiting 24 hours (or time manipulation), and ensuring the removal happens *within* the window is hard to pinpoint without precise logging or controlled test environments.
